meta.title: Careers — Vela
meta.description: Join a small team building something quietly radical. We're hiring for attitude, curiosity, and craft.

hero.p: We're a small, fully remote team of 12. We move slowly on purpose, care deeply about craft, and believe that how we work matters as much as what we build.

perks.p: We've built the conditions we wish we'd had at every job before this one.

remote.p: Work from wherever you do your best thinking. No return-to-office surprises, ever.

async.p: Minimal meetings. Deep work is protected. We document well and trust each other to move forward.

pto.p: Unlimited PTO with a mandatory 20-day minimum. Rest is part of the work here.

equipment.p: $2,500 on day one to build a workspace that genuinely serves you.

learning.p: $1,500 per year for books, courses, conferences, or whatever helps you grow.

health.p: Full medical, dental, and vision. Plus a $100/month wellness stipend — use it however you define wellbeing.

culture.p1: We don't optimise for speed of execution. We optimise for getting things right — which sometimes means slowing down, sitting with ambiguity, and changing direction when the evidence calls for it.
culture.p2: Curiosity is the one thing we never negotiate on. Everyone here asks questions first and reaches for conclusions second.

craft.title: Craft over speed
craft.desc: We'd rather ship one thing that lasts than ten things we're embarrassed by.

honest.title: Honest disagreement
honest.desc: We say what we mean, kindly. Silence is not consensus here.

autonomy.title: Autonomy with context
autonomy.desc: You know the why. The how is yours to figure out.

rest.title: Rest as a value
rest.desc: Burnout is a design failure. We take it seriously and prevent it before it happens.

roles.p: We hire for attitude, curiosity, and craft — in that order.

cta.p: If you believe in what we're building and think you belong here — even if there's no open role that fits — we'd love to hear from you.
